g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is early stopping in machine learning?')
sendPrompt('What happens when val F1 does not improve?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a new best is found after no improvement?')
sendPrompt('Why do we save a checkpoint when we get a new best?')
sendPrompt('What is the patience parameter in early stopping?')
sendPrompt('Why does early stopping prevent overfitting?')
